data.title: Can Decentralized Platforms Fix Social Media’s Biggest Problems?
data.description:
TL;DR Centralized social networks have raised privacy and monetization concerns, fueling the debate over decentralized alternatives. Web3 platforms promise greater user control and tokenized economies but face adoption and scalability challenges. Decentralization reduces censorship but complicates moderation. The key question is whether they can balance autonomy, usability, and sustainability....
source: https://crypto-economy.com/can-decentralized-platforms-fix-social-medias-biggest-problems/

data.title: Michael Saylor pushes US gov’t to purchase up to 25% of Bitcoin supply
data.description:
Strategy founder Michael Saylor believes the US government should aim to hold 25% of Bitcoin’s supply by 2035, when 99% of all BTC will have been issued.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/strategy-michael-saylor-bitcoin-purchase-us-government-donald-trump?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Jupiter founder: New token verification system will be launched next week, and the community will be deeply involved
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The founder of Jupiter posted on the social platform that the team will launch a new token verification system next week, aiming to improve the accuracy and efficiency of asset verification.
According to it, the system will be based on data-driven algorithms and introduce a community review mechanism, enabling users to play an important role in the token verification process. Currently, the system has made significant progress and specific details will be announced soon. The founder also pointed out that with the surge in the issuance of new coins in the market, the team is still optimizing the verification process and called on the community to wait patiently for the system to be fully implemented.

data.title: Tokenized U.S. Treasury Bonds Surge to $4.07 Billion
data.description: According to PANews, data from RWA.xyz reveals that the value of tokenized U.S. Treasury bonds has surged to $4.07 billion, marking an increase of $1.57 billion over the past 103 days. The Hashnote Short-Term Yield Coin (USYC) holds the largest market capitalization among these assets. Since November 26 of last year, USYC's market cap has risen by $461.2 million, climbing from $495.07 million to $956.27 million.

data.title: $VON rose above 0.0002U, with the highest increase reaching 328.95%; $PWEASE rose above 0.039U, with the highest increase reaching 879.9%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News LBank market shows: $VON rose above 0.0002U, and is now quoted at 0.0002793U, with a 24-hour increase of X%. Since its launch on LBank, the highest increase has reached 328.95%, and the current market value is about 68 million US dollars.
At the same time, $PWEASE rose above 0.039U, and is now quoted at 0.036699U, with a 24-hour increase of X%. Since its launch on LBank, the highest increase has reached 879.9%, and the current market value is about 36 million US dollars.
